Aceternity UI Pro — Blocks

134 premium component blocks captured from ui.aceternity.com/live-preview/* (SSR'd HTML). Each block is production-ready: hero sections, bento grids, navbars, pricing, testimonials, shaders, feature sections. Pro tier source code is behind auth; what we have is the fully-rendered HTML+CSS output.

134 blocks captured 22 block categories 151 blocks catalogued

Aceternity UI Pro blocks captured from public live-preview URLs. Full TSX source is paywalled at ui.aceternity.com/pricing. Demos here are the rendered HTML — they reference ui.aceternity.com CDN for CSS/JS/images, so preview links need internet access to render fully. For internal / reference use only.
